query:
-- Update ML for Tennessee@Michigan (ID 2490001) - away=tennessee, home=michigan
UPDATE games SET awayML = '+330', homeML = '-425' WHERE id = 2490001;

-- Set bracketGameId, bracketRound, bracketRegion for both real games
-- Tennessee@Michigan = MIDWEST E8 (bracketGameId 504, feeds into F4 game 602)
UPDATE games SET 
  bracketGameId = 504,
  bracketRound = 'E8',
  bracketRegion = 'MIDWEST',
  nextBracketGameId = 602
WHERE id = 2490001;

-- Connecticut@Duke = EAST E8 (bracketGameId 501, feeds into F4 game 601)
UPDATE games SET 
  bracketGameId = 501,
  bracketRound = 'E8',
  bracketRegion = 'EAST',
  nextBracketGameId = 601
WHERE id = 2460001;

-- Also update the placeholder rows to reflect actual teams
UPDATE games SET awayTeam = 'tennessee', homeTeam = 'michigan' WHERE id = 1890051;
UPDATE games SET awayTeam = 'connecticut', homeTeam = 'duke' WHERE id = 1890048;

SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, bracketGameId, bracketRound, bracketRegion, awayML, homeML, bookTotal FROM games WHERE id IN (2490001, 2460001, 1890051, 1890048);
